steps.title: Identify intercepts from the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis at $(0, 2)$ and the $x$-axis at $(2, 0)$.

steps.title: Test choice C by substituting both points
steps.content:
Choice C is $18x + Ry = 36$.

At $(0, 2)$: $18(0) + R(2) = 36 \Rightarrow 2R = 36 \Rightarrow R = 18$

Verify at $(2, 0)$: $18(2) + 18(0) = 36 + 0 = 36$ ✓

Since $R = 18$ is positive and satisfies both points, this equation represents the relationship. That matches choice C — C is correct.
